configurations.name: viral-verify
runtimeArgs: set NEXT_DISTDIR=.next-verify&& set NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096&& npx next dev -p 3988

configurations.name: reftest-a-legacy
runtimeArgs: set NEXT_DISTDIR=.next-fable-test&& set NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096&& set COVER_TEST_LOCAL_OPEN=1&& npx next start -p 3901

configurations.name: reftest-b-v2only
runtimeArgs: set NEXT_DISTDIR=.next-fable-test&& set NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096&& set COVER_TEST_LOCAL_OPEN=1&& set MEGA_REF_HERO_V2=1&& npx next start -p 3901

configurations.name: reftest-c-v2strict
runtimeArgs: set NEXT_DISTDIR=.next-fable-test&& set NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096&& set COVER_TEST_LOCAL_OPEN=1&& set MEGA_REF_HERO_V2=1&& set MEGA_STRICT_RENDER=1&& npx next start -p 3901
